BacterialLeafBlight.symptoms: Water-soaked lesions at leaf tips and margins that turn yellow, then brown. Leaves dry out completely in severe cases (kresek stage).
BacterialLeafBlight.cause: A bacterial infection spread by wind, rain splash, and irrigation water. Enters through wounds or hydathodes. High nitrogen levels increase susceptibility.
BacterialLeafBlight.favorable_conditions: High humidity, heavy rainfall, standing water, and temperatures between 25–34°C.
BacterialLeafBlight.spread: Wind-driven rain, infected seeds, contaminated tools, and irrigation water.
BacterialLeafBlight.affected_stage: Seedling to tillering stage (most destructive early stage).
BacterialLeafBlight.treatment_en: 1. Apply copper-based bactericides (Copper Oxychloride). 2. Maintain proper drainage. 3. Avoid excess nitrogen fertilizer. 4. Use resistant rice varieties (e.g., IR varieties).
BacterialLeafBlight.treatment_ur: 1۔ کاپر آکسی کلورائڈ استعمال کریں۔ 2۔ کھیت میں پانی کا نکاس بہتر کریں۔ 3۔ نائٹروجن کھاد کم کریں۔ 4۔ مزاحم اقسام استعمال کریں۔
BacterialLeafBlight.prevention: Use certified seeds, avoid dense planting, maintain field hygiene, and monitor regularly.

BrownSpot.symptoms: Small circular to oval brown lesions with grey centers. Can appear on leaves, grains, and seedlings.
BrownSpot.cause: Fungal disease due to nutrient deficiency (especially Potassium and Nitrogen imbalance).
BrownSpot.favorable_conditions: Dry conditions, poor soil fertility, temperatures around 25–30°C.
BrownSpot.spread: Airborne spores, infected seeds, and crop residue.
BrownSpot.affected_stage: All growth stages, especially grain filling stage.
BrownSpot.treatment_en: 1. Apply fungicides like Mancozeb or Iprodione. 2. Improve soil fertility using Potassium. 3. Treat seeds before sowing.
BrownSpot.treatment_ur: 1۔ مینکوزیب استعمال کریں۔ 2۔ پوٹاشیم شامل کریں۔ 3۔ بیج کو پہلے ٹریٹ کریں۔
BrownSpot.prevention: Balanced fertilization, proper irrigation, and use of healthy seeds.

Healthy.symptoms: Green, upright leaves with no visible lesions or discoloration.
Healthy.favorable_conditions: Proper sunlight, irrigation, and balanced nutrients.
Healthy.treatment_en: No treatment required. Continue monitoring and maintain irrigation and fertilization schedule.
Healthy.treatment_ur: کسی علاج کی ضرورت نہیں۔ معمول کی دیکھ بھال جاری رکھیں۔
Healthy.prevention: Regular field inspection and pest monitoring.

LeafBlast.symptoms: Diamond-shaped lesions with grey centers and dark borders on leaves.
LeafBlast.cause: Fungal infection promoted by high humidity and excessive nitrogen use.
LeafBlast.favorable_conditions: Cool nights (20–26°C), high humidity (>90%), and leaf wetness.
LeafBlast.spread: Airborne spores and infected crop debris.
LeafBlast.treatment_en: 1. Use Tricyclazole or Carbendazim fungicides. 2. Reduce nitrogen usage. 3. Maintain proper water levels.
LeafBlast.treatment_ur: 1۔ ٹرائیسائکلازول استعمال کریں۔ 2۔ یوریا کم کریں۔ 3۔ پانی کی سطح برقرار رکھیں۔
LeafBlast.prevention: Resistant varieties, proper spacing, and avoiding over-fertilization.

LeafScald.symptoms: Irregular lesions with light centers and dark brown margins, giving a scalded appearance.
LeafScald.cause: Fungal disease transmitted via infected seeds and plant debris.
LeafScald.treatment_en: 1. Apply Benomyl or Thiophanate-methyl. 2. Use clean seeds. 3. Practice crop rotation.
LeafScald.treatment_ur: 1۔ بینومائل استعمال کریں۔ 2۔ صاف بیج استعمال کریں۔ 3۔ فصلوں کی تبدیلی کریں۔

NarrowBrownSpot.symptoms: Narrow, linear brown lesions mainly on leaves.
NarrowBrownSpot.cause: Fungal infection during later growth stages.
NarrowBrownSpot.favorable_conditions: High humidity and dense crop canopy.
NarrowBrownSpot.treatment_en: 1. Use Propiconazole if infection is severe. 2. Grow resistant varieties.
NarrowBrownSpot.treatment_ur: 1۔ پروپیکونازول سپرے کریں۔ 2۔ مزاحم اقسام اگائیں۔
